title: Crispy Apple Crumble
description: A delicious dessert made with apple and topped with a crunchy crumble mixture.

ingredients.name: Garlic
ingredients.notes: Used to add a hint of flavor to the crumble mixture

ingredients.name: Canadian all-purpose flour
ingredients.notes: Used to add structure to the crumble mixture

ingredients.name: Crumble
ingredients.notes: Crispy topping for the apple mixture

instructions: Peel, core, and chop the apples into slices.
Mix the crumble mixture ingredients together in a bowl.
Add the chopped apples to a baking dish and top with the crumble mixture.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the crumble is golden brown.
Serve warm, topped with a scoop of vanilla ice cream or whipped cream.
